mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0104-03#Sql001 */ A.BRAND_CODE, B.BRAND_NAME, A.TRADE_PRICE, A.ORDER_NO AS MANAGE_NUMBER, A.ORDER_TIME AS ORDER_DATE, A.APPOINT_TIME AS TRADE_DATE_TIME, A.TRADE_TYPE AS TRADE_KBN, A.ORDER_COUNT AS QUANTITY, A.APPOINT_PRICE AS CONTRACT_AMOUNT, A.DEPOSIT_TYPE, A.KESSAI_TUKA AS SETTLEMENT_TYPE, A.INVITATION_TYPE AS KANYU_KBN, A.ORDER_METHOD, A.WARNING_APPLY AS WARNING_APPLY_TRADE, A.EXPLANATION_INFO AS IMPORTANT_MATTER_TYPE_TEXT, A.FOREIGN_STOCK_YMD, A.FS_DELIVERY_YMD AS DOCUMENT_DELIVERY_DATE, A.FS_DELIVERY_METHOD AS INFORMATION_DELIVERED_TEXT, A.TRANSFER_INVITATION AS SOLICITATION_ETF_TEXT, A.ENG_PUB_BRAND AS ENG_PUB_TEXT, A.ENG_PUB_YMD, A.SUMMARY_ANY, A.ORDER_STATUS AS STATUS, A.RECALL_REASON AS CANCEL_REASON, A.COMMENT_INFO AS "COMMENT" FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER A LEFT OUTER JOIN M_COUNTER_BRAND B ON A.BRAND_CODE = B.BRAND_CODE
A.ORDER_NO = #{req.manageNumber} AND A.TRADE_TYPE = #{req.tradeKbn}
